languages.text: "Кажется, вы и сами оказались жертвой тонкой манипуляции одной особы..."

traits.locale_text: ""Кажется, вы и сами оказались жертвой тонкой манипуляции одной особы...""

languages.text: "It seems that you yourself have fallen victim to the subtle manipulation of one individual..."

languages.text: “看来，你自己反倒成了某人精心操控的棋子……”
languages.original_text: "It seems that you yourself have fallen victim to the subtle manipulation of one individual..."

traits.locale_text: “看来，你自己反倒成了某人精心操控的棋子……”

languages.text: « On dirait que vous êtes vous-même victime des manipulations subtiles d'une certaine personne... »
languages.original_text: "It seems that you yourself have fallen victim to the subtle manipulation of one individual..."

traits.locale_text: « On dirait que vous êtes vous-même victime des manipulations subtiles d'une certaine personne... »

languages.text: "Görünüşe göre kendi kendine ince manipülasyonlara kurban gitmişsin..."
languages.original_text: "It seems that you yourself have fallen victim to the subtle manipulation of one individual..."

traits.locale_text: "Görünüşe göre kendi kendine ince manipülasyonlara kurban gitmişsin..."

languages.text: «Parece que usted también ha caído en la sutil manipulación de alguien...».
languages.original_text: "It seems that you yourself have fallen victim to the subtle manipulation of one individual..."

traits.locale_text: «Parece que usted también ha caído en la sutil manipulación de alguien...».

languages.text: "Ihr scheint der subtilen Manipulation einer Person zum Opfer gefallen zu sein ..."
languages.original_text: "It seems that you yourself have fallen victim to the subtle manipulation of one individual..."

languages.text: 「あなた自身も、ある人物の巧妙な操りによって、被害者になってしまったようですね…」
